title: [CI:DOCS] Migrate skopeo container image
body:
Moved to: https://github.com/containers/image_build

This is needed to consolidate both the content and the automation into one location. Having both in the same place is intended to both protect push secrets and allow for PR-level CI testing.

comments.body: @mtrmac good suggestion.  I just force-pushed with a `install.md` change as well.
This is ready to go, new [build automation is functional and pushing images from `containers/image_build`](https://cirrus-ci.com/build/5993980085665792).
